summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Combo + Game booking and Table Reservation features for Espace Maxo. Fixed 1 critical backend bug in /api/combo-orders endpoint. All APIs working correctly, all UI features functional.

fixed.issue: Pydantic validation error - Booking model missing required field 'total_game_price' and using non-existent fields 'payment_option' and 'transaction_id'
fixed.fix: Updated Booking creation in create_combo_order() to include all required fields correctly

integration_issues.issue: Cart floating button has animate-bounce CSS animation causing Playwright selector instability - not a user-facing bug

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/menu returns combos with is_combo field
✅ Backend: POST /api/combo-orders rejects missing fields (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/combo-orders rejects orders without items (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/combo-orders creates order successfully (VR 360° - 2000 FCFA/game)
✅ Backend: POST /api/combo-orders creates order successfully (Simulator - 1500 FCFA/game)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/combo-orders requires auth (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/combo-orders returns orders list with auth
✅ Backend: POST /api/table-reservations rejects missing fields (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/table-reservations rejects invalid deposit amounts (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/table-reservations accepts 5000 FCFA deposit
✅ Backend: POST /api/table-reservations accepts 25000 FCFA deposit
✅ Backend: POST /api/table-reservations works without special_occasion
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/table-reservations requires auth (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/table-reservations returns reservations with stats
✅ Backend: Admin login with Esp@ceM@xo2026 returns admin_full role
✅ Backend: Admin login with MaxoConsult2026 returns admin_readonly role
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard statistics
✅ Backend: GET /api/slots/{date} returns available time slots
✅ Frontend: /menu page displays only combos (4 items)
✅ Frontend: Menu shows 'NOS COMBOS' title
✅ Frontend: Each combo has 'COMBO' badge and 'Jeux VR inclus dans ce combo!' text
✅ Frontend: 'Ajouter au panier' buttons present on all combos
✅ Frontend: /reserver-table page loads with complete form
✅ Frontend: Table reservation form has all required fields (name, phone, date, time, guests, occasion, notes)
✅ Frontend: Deposit options available: 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 25000 FCFA
✅ Frontend: 'Acompte déductible' info banner displayed
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard has 'Combos' tab
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard has 'Tables' tab
✅ Frontend: Combos tab shows combo orders with details
✅ Frontend: Tables tab shows table reservations with deposit amounts
seed_data_creation: Created test combo orders and table reservations via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features implemented: 1) Combo ordering with integrated game session booking at /menu, 2) Table reservation with deposit (5000-25000 FCFA) at /reserver-table, 3) Admin tabs for Combos and Tables. Backend bug in create_combo_order was fixed. All APIs and UI verified working. Payment integration uses Kkiapay (sandbox mode available).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In server.py create_combo_order function, when creating a Booking object, the code was using incorrect field names (payment_option, transaction_id) and missing required field (total_game_price)
reproduction_steps: 3. Check backend logs for Pydantic ValidationError
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Updated Booking() instantiation to include total_game_price, reservation_fee, amount_to_pay, payment_type, and payment_session_id fields correctly
